summary: Subscription Billing System fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified working.

issues: Console warnings about Recharts chart dimensions - non-critical library issue

backend_apis: GET /api/subscriptions/plans - Returns 4 billing cycles with correct discounts (0%, 5%, 10%, 15%)
GET /api/subscriptions/config - Super Admin can retrieve billing configuration
POST /api/subscriptions/config - Super Admin can save configuration with bank accounts
POST /api/subscriptions/invoices - Create subscription invoice for base plan ($2,500)
POST /api/subscriptions/invoices - Create subscription invoice for with_billing plan ($3,000)
POST /api/subscriptions/invoices - Create quarterly invoice with 5% discount ($7,125)
POST /api/subscriptions/invoices/{id}/record-payment - Record manual bank transfer payment
GET /api/subscriptions/dashboard - Returns stats, pending invoices, expiring companies
GET /api/subscriptions/my-subscription - Company user can view subscription status
frontend_ui: Super Admin dashboard shows 'Suscripciones' button in header
Stats cards display: Pendiente de Cobro, Cobrado Este Mes, Facturas Pendientes, Vencidas
Revenue chart 'Ingresos por Suscripciones' displays monthly revenue
Tabs 'Pendientes', 'Todas las Facturas', 'Por Vencer' work correctly
'Nueva Factura' button opens create invoice dialog
Create invoice dialog shows company select, plan select, period select, and price preview
'Configuración' button opens configuration dialog with bank accounts
Sidebar shows 'Mi Suscripción' link under CONFIGURACIÓN
Shows subscription status badge (Activa), plan name, expiry date
Pending invoices section displays with 'Pagar con Tarjeta' and 'Transferencia Bancaria' buttons
Bank transfer dialog shows BBVA account with CLABE and copy buttons
'Historial de Pagos' section displays paid invoices
'Planes Disponibles' section shows both plans with features

subscription_plans.details: Base plan $2,500/mes, With Billing $3,000/mes (+$500 for CFDI)

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions - library-level issue, non-breaking
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed subscription invoices for testing - can be cleaned up manually
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription Billing System fully implemented and tested. All 7 backend endpoints working: plans, config (GET/POST), invoices (GET/POST), record-payment, dashboard, my-subscription. Super Admin can manage billing config with bank accounts, create invoices, record payments. Company users can view their subscription status, see pending invoices, and access bank transfer details. Stripe checkout is MOCKED (using test key). Facturama CFDI stamping is also MOCKED.

mocked_apis.note: Stripe checkout sessions use test key (sk_test_emergent). Facturama CFDI stamping/cancellation is also mocked.
mocked_apis.impact: Low - payment flow works for testing, production would need real Stripe/Facturama keys
